text:
まだ見ぬ生物ゆえ、私からキミに
伝えられる情報がほとんどない点は
平に容赦願いたい。

それが故に、依頼を掛けているのも
事実なのだが……

キミは情報などなくても、その場の
状況を頼りに的確な判断を下せる
優秀なアークスだと思っている。

Your target is a species we've yet to observe,
so I hope you can forgive the lack of details.

Of course, had we a wealth of information, I
wouldn't need to ask for your help.

I see you as a top-shelf ARKS operative,
with strong decision-making skills even with
little information to go on.
And as always, I appreciate your help.
